Module com.example.fasttype
Package com.example.fasttype.view

Interface GameView

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameController
public interface GameView
Defines the contract for updating the game's visual interface. Implemented by GameController to decouple the controller logic from direct JavaFX component references.

This interface is used as part of the event-oriented architecture, where the controller notifies the view of state changes via this contract.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Lesly Zapata

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearFeedback()
    Hides the feedback label and clears the input field.
    void
    resetUI()
    Resets all UI components to their initial state for a new game.
    void
    showFeedback(String message, boolean success)
    Displays a feedback message with a visual style depending on success or failure.
    void
    showGameOver(int levelsCompleted, int finalScore, boolean won)
    Transitions the UI to the game-over screen, showing a summary.
    void
    showWord(String word)
    Displays the target word or phrase the player must type.
    void
    updateLevel(int level)
    Updates the displayed level badge.
    void
    updateScore(int score)
    Updates the score display.
    void
    updateTimer(int seconds, int maxSeconds)
    Updates the countdown timer display and progress bar.

  • Method Details

    • updateLevel

      void updateLevel(int level)
      Updates the displayed level badge.
      Parameters:
      level - the current level number to display

    • updateTimer

      void updateTimer(int seconds, int maxSeconds)
      Updates the countdown timer display and progress bar.
      Parameters:
      seconds - remaining seconds to show
      maxSeconds - maximum seconds for this level (used to compute progress ratio)

    • showWord

      void showWord(String word)
      Displays the target word or phrase the player must type.
      Parameters:
      word - the word or phrase to display

    • showFeedback

      void showFeedback(String message, boolean success)
      Displays a feedback message with a visual style depending on success or failure.
      Parameters:
      message - the feedback text (e.g., "¡Correcto!", "Incorrecto")
      success - true for a green/positive style, false for red/negative

    • clearFeedback

      void clearFeedback()
      Hides the feedback label and clears the input field.

    • updateScore

      void updateScore(int score)
      Updates the score display.
      Parameters:
      score - the current accumulated score

    • showGameOver

      void showGameOver(int levelsCompleted, int finalScore, boolean won)
      Transitions the UI to the game-over screen, showing a summary.
      Parameters:
      levelsCompleted - number of levels the player successfully completed
      finalScore - the player's final score
      won - true if the player won (reached max level)

    • resetUI

      void resetUI()
      Resets all UI components to their initial state for a new game.
